nodes.name: 褐背伯劳
nodes.summary: 褐背伯劳（Bay-backed shrike，学名 Lanius vittatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Thus secured they can be ripped with the strong hooked bill, but its feet are not suited for tearing. It is a widespread resident or breeder in southern Asia and occurs in Iran, Afghanistan, Pakistan, Nepal, India, and Turkmenistan
